name: Red Snapper with Green Peppercorn Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons green peppercorns packed in brine or vinegar, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the clam juice and white wine. Boil over high heat until reduced to 1/4 cup, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the cream and continue to boil, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is reduced to 1/3 cup, about 10 minutes. Keep warm over low heat.
4. Butter two pieces of foil large enough to wrap each fillet.
5. Place the fillets on the buttered foil, sprinkle lightly with salt, and dot the fillets with butter. Fold to seal the foil and place the packets on a baking sheet.
6. Bake in the middle of the oven for 12 minutes.
7. Just before serving, add the green peppercorns to the sauce. Heat briefly to warm through.
8. Remove snapper from foil and place on warm plates. Pour the sauce over the fish and serve hot.
